name: Viking TS Context Engine
description: TypeScript-native context database for AI agents. Provides semantic memory storage, retrieval, and automatic capture.
author: viking-ts

local.description: Spawn a local viking-ts server as a subprocess

remote.description: Connect to an existing viking-ts server

baseUrl.description: URL of the remote viking-ts server

autoRecall.description: Automatically search memories before each turn

recallLimit.description: Maximum memories to recall per turn

autoCapture.description: Automatically extract memories after each turn

tools.name: commit_memory
tools.description: Store a memory in the context database. Use this when you want to explicitly remember something for future conversations.

tools.name: search_memories
tools.description: Search the context database for relevant memories. Use this when you need to recall information from past conversations.
